================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D8 2F 32 75 4A
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x5A
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 25

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x5A
PayloadLen   : 25

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
19 2D F0 69 00 46 C3 23 00 00 00 00 14 76 04 44 
00 00 00 00 5C A1 04 C4 0F 

[RETURN VALUE]
19 2D F0 69 00 46 C3 23 00 00 00 00 14 76 04 44 
00 00 00 00 5C A1 04 C4 0F
